pages.raw_text:
Immediate relief from the dangers
of the Division street crossing or death
trap, was this morning promised the
city officials by General Manager Coop
er of the Northern Pacific. His plan
is to stop all switching at Division
street, throwing it all farther east.


For a long time this crossing has been
one of the most dangerous places with
in the city limits. Lawsuit after law
suit has resulted for the railroad peo-
pie and several deaths have occurred.
The road will attempt to eliminate
all this, and to do it Immediately.


The solution proposed was offered
by the ingenius brain of Manager
Cooper and it took the breath both
from the officials of the line and of the
city.


The proposition advanced by the
city was to change the track and run
farther south, in the event of the chief
engineer of the railroad finding it inn
practicable to figure on either sub
way or a viaduct on Division street
at the Sprague crossing.


Build More sidetracks.


Mr.. Coopers plan is that the Nor
thern Pacific build an additional side
track, and contine all of its switching
to the east side of the street crossing,
only coming over Division street with
cars which would be distributed to
to the various business firms of the
city. If one additional sidetrack can
